Q8 MSQ Not checked
Technical • Data Science and artificial Intelligence • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following statements are true?

Correct answer: A, B, C
Solution

(a, b, c)
(a) The sum of eigen values of square matrix is equal to the trace of a matrix.
(b) If a matrix is both symmetric and skew-symmetric is must be a null matrix.
(c) Eigen value of A and its transpose are the same.
(d) For a n × n matrix, inverse exists only if rank = n.
